summary: Tested Style Options input_type system. Backend: 10/10 tests PASSED - input_type, has_text_input, text_label fields all work correctly for parameters, options, and sub-options. Frontend Admin Style Management: All features verified - Input Type dropdown (Image Only/Text Only/Image + Text), Txt toggle on options, Sub toggle for sub-options, text label configuration, and Save Changes functionality all working.

issues: PostHog and Cloudflare Insights scripts blocked - not critical, affects analytics only

critical_code_review_comments: styling.py lines 17-25: SubStyleOption model correctly includes has_text_input and text_label fields
styling.py lines 27-36: StyleOption model correctly includes has_sub_options, sub_options, has_text_input, and text_label fields
styling.py lines 39-46: StyleParameter model correctly includes input_type (default 'image_only') and text_label fields
StyleManagementPage.jsx lines 561-580: Input Type Select dropdown working with Image Only, Text Only, Image + Text options
StyleManagementPage.jsx lines 707-717: Txt toggle with has_text_input working on options
StyleManagementPage.jsx lines 815-821: Sub-option Txt toggle working correctly
StylingPage.jsx lines 1001-1011: text_only input_type renders text input instead of image cards
StylingPage.jsx lines 1063-1082: Per-option text input renders when option.has_text_input is true
StylingPage.jsx lines 1085-1098: Parameter-level text input renders for image_and_text input_type
StylingPage.jsx lines 1143-1162: Sub-option text input renders when sub.has_text_input is true
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 'suits' product styling data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Style Options input_type system fully tested: 1) StyleParameter supports input_type field with values 'image_only', 'text_only', 'image_and_text' (default: image_only). 2) StyleOption supports has_text_input and text_label fields. 3) SubStyleOption supports has_text_input and text_label fields. 4) Admin StyleManagementPage shows Input Type dropdown on each parameter header. 5) When 'Text Only' selected, options grid hidden and text field configuration shown. 6) When 'Image + Text' selected, both options and text field shown. 7) Each option has 'Txt' toggle to enable per-option text input with text_label. 8) Sub-options also have 'Txt' toggle for text input. 9) Save Changes persists all fields correctly. 10) Existing 'Specific Style - Write' option in Lapel has has_text_input=true preserved.

features_tested.admin_input_type_dropdown_visible: PASS - Input Type dropdown visible on each parameter header
features_tested.admin_text_only_hides_options: PASS - Selecting 'Text Only' hides options grid, shows text field configuration
features_tested.admin_image_and_text_shows_both: PASS - Selecting 'Image + Text' shows both options and text field
features_tested.admin_txt_toggle_on_options: PASS - Each option has 'Txt' toggle visible
features_tested.admin_txt_toggle_shows_text_label: PASS - When 'Txt' toggle on, text label input appears below option
features_tested.admin_sub_options_txt_toggle: PASS - Sub-options have 'Txt' toggle for text input
features_tested.admin_save_persists_fields: PASS - Save Changes persists input_type, text_label, has_text_input
features_tested.backend_put_saves_has_text_input: PASS - PUT saves has_text_input, text_label on options/sub-options
